name: Here4Solar UK solar export tariff flat-rate snapshot
description: A dated editorial dataset of selected publicly advertised residential solar export tariffs from six major UK suppliers. Dynamic and time-of-use tariffs are excluded because they cannot be represented by one comparable pence-per-kWh rate.
coverage: Selected flat-rate residential export tariffs from British Gas, EDF, E.ON Next, Good Energy, Octopus Energy and OVO.

columns.supplier: Supplier or brand advertising the tariff.
columns.rate_p_per_kwh: Advertised flat export rate in pence per kWh on the checked date.
columns.rate_type: How the supplier describes the price or term.
columns.import_supplier_required: Whether the public summary explicitly requires the same company to supply imported electricity: yes, no or not_stated.
columns.installer_or_purchase_required: Whether the public summary explicitly ties the rate to a qualifying installation or purchase route: yes, no or not_stated.
columns.battery_required: Whether a battery is explicitly required for this rate: yes, no or not_stated.
columns.system_size_public_summary: Capacity condition shown in the supplier's public summary where relevant.
columns.checked_date: Date the source page was checked, ISO 8601.
columns.notes: Important public eligibility or interpretation note. The supplier's full terms govern.

rows.system_size_public_summary: not stated on public tariff summary
rows.notes: For customers whose solar panels and battery were installed by Good Energy Solar; rolls to Solar Savings after the fixed term.

rows.tariff: SEG Install Exclusive - solar and battery
rows.notes: OVO must install the solar panels and home-storage battery; other published criteria also apply.

rows.rate_type: 12-month offer; term sheet governs price status
rows.notes: Qualifying EDF or Contact Solar route for solar, battery or both after 2 March 2026; see the tariff terms and term sheet.

rows.system_size_public_summary: residential renewable generation system up to 15kW
rows.notes: For a solar and/or battery installation by E.ON Installation Services from 10 November 2025; the public summary does not state an import-supply requirement.

rows.system_size_public_summary: solar PV; public page directs readers to eligibility criteria
rows.notes: Available to existing residential EDF electricity customers, subject to published eligibility and terms.
OVO must install the solar panels; other published criteria also apply.

rows.system_size_public_summary: residential renewable generation system up to 15kW
rows.notes: Requires an E.ON Next import tariff, excluding the time-of-use tariffs identified by E.ON Next.

rows.system_size_public_summary: not stated on public tariff summary
rows.notes: Available to Good Energy electricity-supply customers with solar panels; the variable rate can move up or down.

rows.system_size_public_summary: eligible renewable generation and export metering required
rows.notes: Requires an Octopus import account and a compatible import tariff; rates can change with notice.
For OVO electricity-supply customers; the installation does not have to have been supplied by OVO.
British Gas must supply the property's electricity; exclusions in the full terms apply.
British Gas must supply the property's electricity; exclusions in the full terms apply.
The public eligibility summary describes new and existing customers but does not state an import-supply requirement.

rows.system_size_public_summary: eligible generation up to 5MW; tariff-specific limits can apply
rows.notes: Exclusive to EDF electricity customers; EDF says the rate can move up or down.

rows.system_size_public_summary: eligible renewable generation and export metering required
rows.notes: Octopus describes this as an export-only route that can be combined with another supplier's import tariff.
OVO says the home's electricity supply can be with any provider.

rows.system_size_public_summary: eligible generation up to 5MW; tariff-specific limits can apply
rows.notes: Available whether EDF or another supplier provides the home's imported electricity.

rows.system_size_public_summary: public page describes the route for non-British-Gas customers and other specified cases
rows.notes: British Gas says this rate applies if it does not supply the property's electricity, and to certain other applicant categories.
